title: × astrolista bicarinata
intro: × Astrolista bicarinata, also known as the two-horned astrolista, is a plant species belonging to the family Menispermaceae, native to tropical regions. The medicinal properties of × Astrolista bicarinata lie in its roots and bark, which contain alkaloids and other bioactive compounds that possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. × Astrolista bicarinata is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its extracts are used in traditional medicine to address various health issues.
